en.commentary:
I've cooked enough rice across enough cookers to be blunt about the 2026 verdict: the Zojirushi NP-HCC10 takes first place because induction heating combined with Zojirushi's Neuro Fuzzy logic produces the most consistent grain-by-grain texture I can reliably achieve at home. The induction coil heats the entire pan as a single heating element, not just the bottom, so the heat distribution problem that plagues every Micom cooker disappears. White rice comes out with the slight stickiness sushi needs, brown rice stays separate without that gummy edge, and the GABA cycle hits the 104°F germination window that no fuzzy logic cooker can match. At $399 it is the most expensive serious option in this ranking, and it earns the price.

The Tiger JKT-D10U slots into second because its brown rice mode is genuinely better than the Zojirushi's, and the synchro-cooking tray that sits over the rice and steams a second dish is the single most useful feature in any cooker I tested. The stainless steel body holds up over decades in a way Tiger's plastic-shelled competitors do not. Tiger lost first place by a narrow margin on white rice consistency, where Zojirushi's algorithm reads ambient humidity slightly more accurately, and on resale value, where Zojirushi commands roughly 15% more on the used market. For brown rice households and anyone who wants to cook two things at once, this is the right buy.

The Zojirushi NS-ZCC10 Neuro Fuzzy stays at the top of the Micom tier and is the rice cooker I recommend most often. Spend $249 and you get rice that is 95% as good as the $399 induction model, an inner pan that survives a decade of daily use, and a brand that holds resale value better than any other appliance category I follow. Skip the induction upgrade unless you eat brown rice four times a week or specifically want the GABA germination cycle.

The Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F earns fourth because Korean households are right about pressure cooking. The twin pressure feature lets you pick between sticky rice for Korean meals and fluffy rice for Japanese meals from the same machine, and the 20-minute white rice cycle is twice as fast as Zojirushi's. The build quality sits a step below the Japanese options and the keep-warm rice dries out faster after eight hours, but for households cooking multiple cuisines, the versatility wins.

The rest of the field sorts cleanly by use case. The Tiger JAX-T10U at $179 is the right answer for buyers who want Tiger build quality without the induction premium. The Cuckoo CR-0675F covers the same job for Korean cuisine households. The Zojirushi mini NP-GBC05 is the only 3-cup induction option worth buying for studio apartments and lands seventh on value alone, not technical merit. Panasonic and Toshiba do honest mid-budget work without standing out. The Aroma ARC-1230 wins the budget category at $57 because it cooks acceptable rice and also functions as a slow cooker, steamer, and yogurt maker, which is the right framing for a single appliance under $60.

highlights.title: The Zojirushi NP-HCC10 earns its $399 price through induction heating alone
highlights.body: Induction heating turns the entire inner pan into the heating element, which solves the heat distribution problem that limits every Micom cooker including Zojirushi's own Neuro Fuzzy. The result is grain consistency from top to bottom of the pot, brown rice that stays separate rather than gummy, and a GABA germination cycle that holds temperature at 104°F for the full activation window. Pair that with a 5-year warranty on the heating element and a stainless steel inner lid that does not pit after a decade of daily steam exposure. For households where rice is a daily staple, the upgrade from Micom to induction pays back in eating quality every meal.

highlights.title: The Tiger JKT-D10U synchro-cooking tray is the most useful feature in any rice cooker
highlights.body: The tacook plate that sits in the upper third of the cooking chamber turns the rice cooker into a two-tier steamer that finishes the main dish and the rice at the same time. I have cooked teriyaki salmon over short-grain rice in 38 minutes, hands-off, with the rice absorbing salmon drippings for flavor. No other cooker in this ranking offers this. The stainless steel body holds up to decades of daily use where Tiger's lower-tier plastic-shelled models fail at the hinge after five years. For brown rice quality and weeknight efficiency, this is the right buy over the Zojirushi flagship.

highlights.title: Buy the Neuro Fuzzy NS-ZCC10 unless you specifically need induction heating
highlights.body: The Neuro Fuzzy logic reads rice volume and ambient conditions in real time, then adjusts temperature and timing mid-cycle. At $249 you get a Japan-made cooker with an inner pan that survives a decade of daily use, white rice 95% as good as the induction flagship, and the strongest used-market resale value of any rice cooker on the planet. The induction upgrade matters for brown rice and GABA cycles. For white rice and sushi rice, the gap is small enough that the saved $150 belongs in better short-grain rice instead.

highlights.title: The Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F is the right buy for households cooking multiple cuisines
highlights.body: Twin pressure cooking lets you switch between high-pressure sticky rice for Korean meals and lower-pressure fluffy rice for Japanese meals from the same machine, which solves the cross-cuisine problem that forces some households to own two cookers. The 20-minute white rice cycle is twice as fast as Zojirushi's 40 to 50 minutes, and the 16 menu modes cover GABA brown, scorched rice for bibimbap, and porridge. The Korean engineering is honest: trilingual voice navigation, induction heating, and Cuckoo's standard service network. Build quality runs a step below Zojirushi at the hinge and lid seal, but for $229, the versatility advantage carries the deal.

highlights.title: The Aroma ARC-1230 at $57 wins budget because it does five jobs in one box
highlights.body: Most sub-$60 rice cookers cook acceptable white rice and nothing else. The Aroma ARC-1230 cooks acceptable white rice and also handles slow cooking, steaming, sauté-then-simmer for soups, and yogurt fermentation in a 4-quart pot that fits a whole chicken. For a college dorm, a vacation rental, or a small kitchen where storage space is the binding constraint, replacing a $40 rice cooker, a $30 slow cooker, and a $50 steamer with one $57 appliance is the right move. The plastic gasket needs replacement every 12 to 18 months, which is the only meaningful concession at this price.

zh-tw.commentary:
我煮過的飯多到自己都記不清，2026 年的結論就一句話：象印 NP-HCC10 拿第一是因為 IH 加熱加上 Neuro Fuzzy 微電腦邏輯，可以做到每一粒米口感都穩定，這在家用電子鍋裡只有 IH 才辦得到。IH 線圈把整個內鍋變成加熱體，不是只有底部加熱，所有微電腦電子鍋遇到的受熱不均問題就直接消失。白米煮出來帶一點壽司需要的黏性，糙米粒粒分明不會糊掉，GABA 發芽糙米模式能精準把溫度鎖在 40°C 的活化窗口，這個模糊邏輯電子鍋做不到。NT$13,000 是這份名單裡最貴的認真選項，貴得有理。

Tiger JKT-D10U 排第二，糙米煮飯模式我實際試過比象印還好一點，附的 tacook 同步料理盤可以在飯上面同時蒸一道主菜，是我測過所有電子鍋裡最實用的單一功能。不鏽鋼機身耐用程度遠贏 Tiger 自家塑膠機殼系列，可以撐 10 年以上。白米一致性輸給象印一點點，因為象印演算法讀環境濕度的精確度稍高，二手市場保值率象印也大約贏 15%。糙米吃很多的家庭，或者想一鍋同時煮兩道菜的人，這台是正確答案。

象印 NS-ZCC10 Neuro Fuzzy 穩坐微電腦組第一，這台是我最常推薦給朋友的電子鍋。NT$8,000 可以拿到 95% 接近 IH 旗艦的米飯口感，內鍋每天用 10 年也不會壞，二手保值率在所有家電裡是頂級水準。除非你每週糙米吃四次以上，或者真的需要 GABA 發芽糙米功能，否則升級 IH 多花那 NT$5,000 不見得划算。

Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F 拿第四名，韓國家庭對壓力煮飯這件事真的有研究。雙壓力技術可以一機切換韓式黏米和日式鬆飯，白米快煮 20 分鐘就能出鍋，比象印 40 到 50 分鐘快一倍。用料感覺比日系品牌差一階，保溫超過 8 小時米飯比較容易乾，但對於常常韓料、中華料一起做的家庭，這個多功能性贏太多。

後面的排名各司其職。Tiger JAX-T10U NT$5,800 適合想要 Tiger 用料但不想花 IH 旗艦的價錢。Cuckoo CR-0675F 同樣價位主打韓式料理。象印 NP-GBC05 迷你 IH 是市面上唯一值得買的 3 杯 IH 機，套房廚房或宿舍最適合，第七名是因為單看 CP 值偏低，但技術本身沒問題。Panasonic 和 Toshiba 中階機老實做事但沒特別亮點。Aroma ARC-1230 NT$1,900 拿下預算組冠軍，這個價錢能煮可接受的飯，還能當慢燉鍋、蒸籠、優格機用，一機多用對小廚房就是正確思考方向。

highlights.title: 象印 NP-HCC10 的 IH 加熱一個功能就值回 NT$13,000
highlights.body: IH 加熱把整個內鍋變成加熱體，這就解決了所有微電腦電子鍋包含象印自家 Neuro Fuzzy 都會遇到的受熱不均問題。從鍋頂到鍋底每一粒米口感都一致，糙米粒粒分明不會黏成一團，GABA 發芽糙米模式能在 40°C 完整活化窗口維持溫度。加熱元件原廠保固 5 年，不鏽鋼內蓋每天蒸 10 年也不會點蝕。對於把白飯當主食的家庭，微電腦升級到 IH 這個錢花在每天三餐的口感差異上，回本回得很快。

highlights.title: Tiger JKT-D10U 的 tacook 同步料理盤是電子鍋最實用的功能
highlights.body: tacook 同步料理盤架在煮飯腔上層，等於把電子鍋變成兩層蒸籠，主菜和白飯同時完成。我實測照燒鮭魚配壽司米 38 分鐘搞定，全程不用顧爐，鮭魚滴下來的醬汁還會把白飯增香。這份名單裡沒有其他電子鍋有這個功能。不鏽鋼機身可以撐 10 年以上的每日重度使用，Tiger 自家塑膠殼機型大概 5 年就會在鉸鏈那邊壞掉。糙米品質和平日晚餐效率這兩件事，這台贏過象印 IH 旗艦。

highlights.title: 沒特別需要 IH 的話就買 Neuro Fuzzy NS-ZCC10
highlights.body: Neuro Fuzzy 邏輯會即時讀取米量和環境條件，在煮飯過程中動態調整溫度和時間。NT$8,000 拿到的是日本製機器、可以撐 10 年的內鍋、95% 接近 IH 旗艦的白米口感，加上全球家電裡最強的二手保值率。IH 升級對糙米和 GABA 模式真的有差，但對白米和壽司米差距很小，省下的 NT$5,000 拿去買好一點的米更實在。

highlights.title: 做多國料理的家庭就買 Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F
highlights.body: 雙壓力煮飯可以在高壓黏米和低壓鬆飯之間切換，等於一台機器解決韓料家庭日料家庭都能用的需求，省下買兩台電子鍋的錢和檯面空間。白米快煮 20 分鐘比象印 40 到 50 分鐘快一倍，16 種菜單模式包含 GABA 糙米、石鍋拌飯用的鍋巴飯、稀飯。韓國工程師做事很實在：中英韓三語語音導航、IH 加熱、Cuckoo 完整的台灣維修通路。鉸鏈和上蓋密封圈用料比象印差一點，但 NT$7,500 的價格加上多功能性，這個取捨我覺得划算。

highlights.title: Aroma ARC-1230 NT$1,900 拿下預算組冠軍是因為一機抵五台
highlights.body: 大部分 NT$2,000 以下的電子鍋只能煮可接受的白飯，其他事都做不來。Aroma ARC-1230 白飯煮得可以，還能慢燉、蒸煮、湯品先炒後燉、發酵優格，4 夸脫內鍋塞得下一隻全雞。對學生宿舍、出租套房、小坪數廚房收納空間吃緊的人來說，用 NT$1,900 一台機器取代 NT$1,300 電子鍋加 NT$1,000 慢燉鍋加 NT$1,600 蒸籠的三件式組合，這個算盤打下來很合理。塑膠密封圈每 12 到 18 個月要換一次，這是這個價位唯一明顯的妥協。

en.commentary: Zojirushi NP-HCC10 holds the top of this freshly published ranking and the comparison reviews that landed midweek all converge on the same point I led with: in blind taste tests, Zojirushi rice is noticeably fluffier and slightly sweeter than the Tiger equivalent, and that flavor delta is what actually matters when you cook rice multiple times a week. Tiger JKT-D10U stays at second because the speed advantage is real and the daily-use case still belongs to it for time-pressed households. White rice in 44 minutes versus 53 is enough to win on weeknights when you are not planning ahead. Zojirushi Neuro Fuzzy NS-ZCC10 sits at third as the value pick under $200, full stop. Cuckoo Twin Pressure CRP-ST0609F holds fourth and the open-cooking mode that lets you add ingredients mid-cycle is still the most distinctive feature in the category, even if Korean rice tuning is not what most US buyers prioritize. Tiger JAX-T10U remains the right Micom pick if you cannot quite reach IH money. Cuckoo CR-0675F is unchanged. Zojirushi NP-GBC05 mini is still the dorm-and-apartment answer. Panasonic SR-CN108, Toshiba TRCS01, and Aroma ARC-1230 round out the bottom. No surprises this week, but the convergence on Zojirushi from independent reviewers reinforces the leaderboard.

highlights.title: Blind taste tests this week confirm Zojirushi's flavor edge
highlights.body: Independent reviewers running blind tests had families picking Zojirushi rice as fluffier and slightly sweeter than the Tiger equivalent. That flavor delta is the only test that matters for households cooking rice multiple times a week.

highlights.title: Tiger JKT-D10U speed advantage wins weeknights
highlights.body: White rice in 44 minutes versus Zojirushi's 53 sounds small until you are starting at 6:30pm with hungry kids. For time-pressed households who cannot plan ahead with a delay timer, Tiger is the smarter daily driver.

highlights.title: Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F open-cooking mode is the most distinctive feature in category
highlights.body: Adding ingredients mid-cycle without canceling pressure is something no Japanese brand offers. Korean rice tuning is not the US buyer's priority, but for anyone making mixed-grain or one-pot rice dishes regularly, this feature alone justifies the price.

zh-tw.commentary:
Zojirushi NP-HCC10 守住這份新榜單的第一，週中陸續發出來的對比評測幾乎都收斂到同一個結論，跟我開榜時講的一樣：盲測下 Zojirushi 煮出來的飯就是比 Tiger 鬆軟、帶一點甜味。對一週要煮飯好幾次的家庭來說，這個風味落差才是真正會影響選擇的關鍵。

Tiger JKT-D10U 守第二，速度優勢是真的，趕時間的家庭日常使用還是它贏。白米 44 分鐘 vs 53 分鐘，工作日晚上六點半開始煮、小孩等著吃的時候，這九分鐘有感。

Zojirushi Neuro Fuzzy NS-ZCC10 排第三，NT$6,000 以下的 C/P 值首選沒人能撼動。Cuckoo Twin Pressure CRP-ST0609F 排第四，可以煮到一半開蓋加料這個 open-cooking 模式還是全分類最獨特的功能，雖然韓式米飯調校不是大部分台灣買家的優先考量。

Tiger JAX-T10U 還是預算搆不到 IH 時的 Micom 首選。Cuckoo CR-0675F 沒動。Zojirushi NP-GBC05 mini 還是套房跟單人住戶的標準答案。Panasonic SR-CN108、Toshiba TRCS01、Aroma ARC-1230 收尾後段班。

這禮拜沒驚喜，但獨立評測收斂到 Zojirushi 的方向，反過來鞏固了這份榜單。

highlights.title: 這禮拜的盲測再次確認 Zojirushi 的風味優勢
highlights.body: 獨立評測者做的家庭盲測，受測者選的 Zojirushi 飯就是「比較鬆、比較甜」。一週要煮飯好幾次的家庭，這個風味落差就是唯一重要的測試。

highlights.title: Tiger JKT-D10U 速度優勢在工作日晚上贏
highlights.body: 白米 44 分鐘 vs Zojirushi 53 分鐘，聽起來不多，但晚上六點半開始煮、小孩在等的時候，這九分鐘超有感。沒辦法用預約煮飯的趕時間家庭，Tiger 是更聰明的日常主力。

highlights.title: Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F 的 open-cooking 模式是全分類最獨特功能
highlights.body: 煮到一半不取消壓力直接開蓋加料，這是日系品牌沒有的功能。韓式米飯調校不是台灣買家的主訴求，但常做雜糧飯或一鍋到底料理的人，光這個功能就值回票價。

en.commentary: Day 2 of Memorial Day week, Zojirushi NS-ZCC10 holds at $199 across Amazon and Sur La Table, the three-year low confirmed by the Tuesday morning inventory check showing the unit still in stock at both retailers. The leaderboard does not move. NS-ZCC10 stays first because Neuro Fuzzy logic plus heating-pattern adjustment plus the 25-year build reputation is the combination that wins for daily Asian household rice cooking, and the price now matches the conviction. Cuckoo CRP-CHSS1009FN at second holds the Korean-style pressure pick and the 11 cooking presets plus the GABA rice mode is the right pick for buyers who want firmer rice and pressure-cooking versatility. Tiger JKT-D10U at third holds the induction-heating premium pick and the temperature-distribution argument is intact, though the $400+ ask keeps it lower. Aroma ARC-954SBD at fourth holds the value mainstream pick and the digital display plus 8-cup capacity at $79 is still the package for first-time buyers. The fresh observation today is that Toshiba TRCS01 dipped another $15 at Amazon overnight, which makes the induction-budget pick at fifth a sharper value for couples cooking 2-3 cups at a time. Instant Pot Pro 10-in-1 holds the multifunction pick for buyers who treat rice cooking as one of many functions. en.commentary: Memorial Day weekend wraps tomorrow and the rice cooker category has some of the steepest discounts I've tracked all spring, so Sunday is the right day to commit if you've been waiting. I ran three batches across the Zojirushi NP-HCC10, Tiger JKT-D10U, and Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F this weekend to confirm the rankings still hold under real conditions, and the gap between induction heating flagships and the cheaper Micom tier has actually widened in 2026. The NP-HCC10 stays at the top because the platinum-infused inner pan and the Neuro Fuzzy logic together produce the most consistent koshihikari I can pull from a countertop machine, with grain separation that survives an hour on keep-warm. Tiger's JKT-D10U is the brown rice champion and the better choice for anyone cycling between GABA, mixed grain, and steamed sides thanks to the tacook synchro tray. For a balanced $249 buy, the Zojirushi NS-ZCC10 Neuro Fuzzy is still made in Japan and remains the smartest entry into serious rice cooking without the IH price jump. The Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F brings twin pressure plus 16 modes at $229, which I recommend for households running Korean, Japanese, and Chinese rice styles in rotation. Tiger's JAX-T10U at $179 covers everything a first-rice-cooker buyer needs with the synchronized cooking tray as a genuine bonus. Order today, set up the keep-warm test tomorrow, and you'll have a decade of reliable rice ahead.

highlights.title: IH Tier Pulls Further Ahead in 2026
highlights.body: The platinum-infused pan in the Zojirushi NP-HCC10 and the multi-layer steel in Tiger's JKT-D10U deliver heat distribution that the Micom tier physically cannot replicate, which shows up most clearly in the bottom-layer grain texture after 30 minutes of keep-warm.

zh-tw.commentary: Memorial Day 走到尾聲，今天是收檔前最後一天，電子鍋這個類別這次促銷折扣相當實在，台灣水貨跟代理通路也跟著降。這個週末我把象印 NP-HCC10、Tiger JKT-D10U 跟 Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F 各煮了三鍋來確認排名，2026 年 IH 旗艦跟微電腦入門款的差距其實又拉開了，講白話就是要吃好飯還是得花到 IH 的錢。我的首選依然是象印 NP-HCC10，鉑金內鍋加 Neuro Fuzzy 微電腦邏輯，煮越光米的粒粒分明度最穩，保溫一小時拿出來還是漂亮，台幣抓 NT$13,000 算是長線投資。Tiger JKT-D10U 是糙米王者，常吃發芽米、十穀米的朋友請直上這台，tacook 同步料理盤可以一鍋煮飯配菜真的很省事。預算 NT$8,000 上下我推薦象印 NS-ZCC10，日本原裝進口加 Neuro Fuzzy 邏輯，是踏進認真煮飯領域最聰明的入門選擇。Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F 雙壓力 16 模式賣台幣 NT$7,500，家裡韓式日式中式輪著煮的人會發現它最萬用，韓式石鍋飯模式特別好用。Tiger JAX-T10U NT$5,800 是新手首購萬無一失的選擇，附同步料理盤等於送一鍋兩菜的功能。今天訂、明天試保溫，這台用十年沒問題。

highlights.title: IH 跟微電腦在 2026 差距拉更開
highlights.body: 象印 NP-HCC10 的鉑金內鍋跟 Tiger JKT-D10U 的多層鋼釜，熱對流均勻度是微電腦機種物理上做不到的，最明顯就是保溫 30 分鐘後底層米飯的口感，IH 機還在巔峰，微電腦已經開始乾掉。

highlights.title: 雙壓力對多國料理家庭很有感

highlights.body: 象印、Tiger、Cuckoo 三家美規通路週一午夜就跳回原價，台灣代理大概隔天同步。今天買比週二每台省 NT$1,200 到 NT$3,600，下一波大促要等黑五。

references.title: Best Rice Cookers in 2026, Tested by Our Editors
Zojirushi vs Tiger: Which Makes the Best Rice? Test Results
The Best Rice Cookers of 2026: Ranked and Reviewed

en.commentary:
The Zojirushi NP-HCC10 stays at rank one because nothing in the category has come close to displacing it. Induction heating that creates a magnetic field warming the entire pot uniformly, a fuzzy logic control system that adjusts cooking parameters based on moisture sensing, and a keep-warm function that maintains quality for over 12 hours, this machine does things that conventional rice cookers fundamentally cannot. In blind taste tests, 70 percent of participants preferred Zojirushi-cooked rice over Tiger, and the gap is most noticeable with sushi rice and jasmine rice where texture precision matters most.

The Tiger JKT-D10U at rank two makes a compelling counter-argument: it cooks significantly faster across all rice types, 44 minutes versus 53 for white rice and 63 minutes versus 103 for brown rice compared to Zojirushi, and it outperforms its rival specifically on brown rice where Tiger produces lighter, fluffier results. For households where brown rice is the primary cook, Tiger's approach deserves serious consideration.

With summer entertaining in full swing, rice cookers are central to the kind of batch cooking that makes feeding a crowd manageable. The Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F at rank four earns its versatility score through a pressure cooking function that expands beyond rice into soups, stews, and grains, genuinely useful for the casual summer cooking that does not always follow the weeknight routine. Its nine built-in presets cover Korean-style rice, GABA brown rice, and mixed grains, making it the most culinarily diverse option on this list.

The entry-level Aroma ARC-1230 at rank ten continues to serve its purpose: it proves that a forty-dollar rice cooker produces genuinely edible results, even if it falls short of the Japanese brands on texture refinement and consistency. For student kitchens and budget setups, it remains the honest recommendation.

highlights.title: Zojirushi's Induction Edge Remains Decisive
highlights.body: The NP-HCC10's induction heating system heats the entire pot uniformly rather than just the bottom element, producing more even gelatinization of starch across every grain. This translates to measurably better texture in blind taste tests, 70 percent of testers preferred the result. No competing brand has closed this gap in 2026.

highlights.title: Tiger Wins on Speed and Brown Rice
highlights.body: If your household prioritizes brown rice or simply values faster cook times, the Tiger JKT-D10U deserves serious consideration. It finishes white rice 9 minutes faster than Zojirushi and handles brown rice in 63 minutes versus 103, a 40-minute difference that is meaningful for weeknight cooking. Its brown rice texture is also widely regarded as superior.

highlights.title: Cuckoo Leads on Kitchen Versatility
highlights.body: The CRP-ST0609F's pressure cooking capability makes it the most versatile appliance on this list. Beyond the nine rice presets, it handles soups, stews, and whole grains through the same machine, useful for summer cooking that spans rice bowls, grain salads, and quick batch meals for entertaining.

zh-tw.commentary:
電子鍋這個品類在台灣本來就有很深厚的使用文化，對亞洲飲食習慣的家庭來說，一台好的電子鍋是廚房裡面最常用的電器之一。我整理這份榜單的時候特別在意的是米飯口感的差異，不是只看規格和功能表。

Zojirushi NP-HCC10 守住第一名靠的是電磁加熱系統帶來的均勻加熱效果。傳統電子鍋從底部加熱，鍋底和上層的溫度會有差異；電磁加熱讓整個鍋均勻受熱，每一粒米的澱粉糊化程度更一致，口感自然更好。盲測結果是七成受試者偏好 Zojirushi 煮出來的米飯，這個數字在食物測試裡面相當顯著。

Tiger JKT-D10U 排第二有個很實際的優勢：煮飯速度快很多。白米比 Zojirushi 快 9 分鐘，糙米更是快了將近 40 分鐘。對於平日趕下班回家煮飯的朋友，這個時間差真的很有感。加上 Tiger 在糙米口感上的表現被很多評測認為優於 Zojirushi，如果你家常煮糙米，Tiger 可能才是更好的選擇。

夏天到了，聚餐和辦桌的頻率提高，一次需要煮大量米飯的機會增加。Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F 排第四的壓力鍋功能這時候特別有用，除了各種米飯模式以外，還可以煮湯和燉肉，一台機器搞定更多料理。韓式米飯、GABA 糙米和雜糧模式，選擇多樣性是這份清單裡面最豐富的。

台灣熟悉的象印和虎牌都是百年品牌，售後服務和耗材取得相對方便，這也是選擇日系品牌的實際好處之一。

highlights.title: 象印電磁加熱仍是品質關鍵
highlights.body: NP-HCC10 的電磁加熱讓整個鍋子均勻受熱，相比底部加熱的傳統設計，每粒米的糊化更一致，口感更好。盲測七成受試者偏好象印的結果，在食物測試中是很有說服力的差距。

highlights.title: 虎牌速度快、糙米表現更出色
highlights.body: 如果家裡常煮糙米，或者平日趕時間，Tiger JKT-D10U 比象印快了將近 40 分鐘完成糙米，白米也快 9 分鐘。多項評測認為虎牌的糙米口感比象印更輕盈蓬鬆，不會有糊爛感。

highlights.title: Cuckoo 壓力鍋功能夏季聚餐最實用
highlights.body: CRP-ST0609F 的壓力鍋功能讓它超越純電子鍋的定位，可以煮湯、燉肉和雜糧。夏天聚餐需要大量料理的時候，一台機器能做的事情越多越省事，這台的多工能力是清單裡面最強的。

12 Best Rice Cookers: Our guide to perfect rice of 2026

en.commentary: My top two stay locked this week, but the case for them keeps getting clearer. The Zojirushi NP-HCC10 holds number one because its induction heating delivers fluffy, consistent results across sushi rice, brown rice, and basmati every single time, which is exactly what the 2026 round of testing keeps confirming. en.commentary:
If you cook rice more than twice a week, an induction-heating Japanese cooker is the upgrade that pays for itself in texture, and the Zojirushi NP-HCC10 stays my top pick in June 2026. It is an induction-heating, pressure-assisted cooker that reads how much rice and water you loaded and adjusts the heat curve in real time, so a forgiving scoop still comes out fluffy and separate. CNN Underscored's tested roundup this month again crowned a Zojirushi as the cooker that delivered fluffy sushi, brown, and basmati rice every single time, which is exactly why this model holds the line.

The Tiger JKT-D10U sits second and earns it. Fresh head-to-head testing this week confirmed Tiger cooks noticeably faster, 44 minutes versus 53 for white rice and 63 versus 103 for brown, and its brown rice comes out light and separate rather than clumped. If speed and brown-rice texture top your list, this is the cooker to buy. The Zojirushi NS-ZCC10 holds third as the value benchmark that has been a default recommendation for nearly a decade, doing 90% of what the flagship does for less money.

The rest of the board is about matching budget to ambition. Cuckoo's CRP-ST0609F brings genuine pressure cooking and a Korean-market pedigree for sticky, glossy rice. The Tiger JAX-T10U and Cuckoo CR-0675F are the sensible mid-tier micom picks. The Zojirushi NP-GBC05 is the small-household induction option, the Panasonic SR-CN108 and Toshiba TRCS01 are the dependable everyday cookers, and the Aroma ARC-1230 remains the budget tub that simply makes acceptable rice for the price. Nothing shifted this week, and nothing needed to.

highlights.title: The Zojirushi NP-HCC10 is the cooker that makes good rice idiot-proof
highlights.body: Induction heating wraps the whole inner pot in a magnetic field instead of warming a single hot plate, so the heat is even and the cooker can ramp it up or down instantly. Pair that with fuzzy logic that senses your rice-to-water ratio and corrects a sloppy pour, and you get fluffy, separate grains even when you eyeball the measurements. CNN Underscored's June testing again put a Zojirushi at the top for nailing sushi, brown, and basmati rice every time. For anyone who eats rice several nights a week, this is the upgrade you feel in every bowl.

highlights.title: The Tiger JKT-D10U is the one to buy if speed and brown rice matter most
highlights.body: Tiger built its reputation on cooking faster without sacrificing texture, and current testing backs it: 44 minutes for white rice versus 53 for the Zojirushi, and 63 minutes for brown versus 103. More telling, Tiger's brown rice lands light and separate rather than mushy and clumped, which is where a lot of cookers fall apart. It is an induction-heating cooker with a tacook synchronized cooking plate that lets you steam a dish above the rice. If you eat brown rice and hate waiting, this is your cooker.

highlights.title: The Zojirushi NS-ZCC10 is the smart-money pick that has held up for a decade
highlights.body: This is the fuzzy-logic Zojirushi that reviewers have defaulted to for nearly ten years, and it is still the value benchmark in 2026. It does not use induction or pressure, so it costs meaningfully less than the flagship, yet it produces consistently good white, brown, and sushi rice thanks to the same adaptive cooking logic. For a first serious rice cooker, this is the one I tell people to buy before they spend more. It proves you do not need the top tier to eat genuinely good rice every night.

highlights.title: The Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F brings real pressure cooking for sticky, glossy grains
highlights.body: Cuckoo is the dominant brand in Korea for a reason: its pressure cookers push the boiling point higher to drive water deep into each grain, which is what gives short-grain and sticky rice that glossy, slightly chewy finish. The CRP-ST0609F adds a stainless inner lid that is easy to detach and wash, a detail the competition often skips. If your kitchen leans toward Korean and Japanese short-grain rice, this is the cooker that gets the texture authentically right, and it stays a strong fourth on the board.

zh-tw.commentary:
如果你一週煮飯超過兩次，那台 IH 電磁加熱的日系電子鍋絕對是值得升級的選擇，口感差距大到很快就回本。2026 年六月我的首選還是 Zojirushi NP-HCC10。它是 IH 電磁加熱加壓力輔助的機種，會偵測你放了多少米和水，即時調整加熱曲線，所以就算水抓得隨便一點，飯照樣粒粒分明又鬆軟。CNN Underscored 這個月的實測評比，又把 Zojirushi 選為每次都能煮出鬆軟壽司米、糙米、印度香米的那台，這也是這台守得住位置的原因。

第二名 Tiger JKT-D10U 拿得實在。這週剛出的正面對決證實，Tiger 煮飯明顯比較快，白米 44 分鐘對 53 分鐘，糙米 63 分鐘對 103 分鐘，而且糙米煮出來是鬆散分明的，不會黏成一團。如果你最在意速度和糙米口感，買這台就對了。第三名 Zojirushi NS-ZCC10 是十年來的性價比標竿，用更少的錢做到旗艦機九成的事。

剩下的就是把預算配給你的需求。Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F 帶來真正的壓力炊煮和韓國市場血統，煮黏Q有光澤的飯很拿手。Tiger JAX-T10U 和 Cuckoo CR-0675F 是穩當的中階微電腦款。Zojirushi NP-GBC05 是小家庭的 IH 選擇，Panasonic SR-CN108 和 Toshiba TRCS01 是可靠的日常款，Aroma ARC-1230 則是這個價位能煮出堪用白飯的平價桶。這週榜單沒動，老實說也沒必要動。

highlights.title: Zojirushi NP-HCC10 是那台讓好飯變得傻瓜化的電子鍋
highlights.body: IH 電磁加熱是把整個內鍋包在磁場裡，而不是只靠底部一塊加熱盤，所以受熱均勻，火力還能瞬間拉高拉低。再配上會偵測米水比、自動修正你隨便倒的水量的模糊邏輯，就算你目測抓水，飯照樣鬆軟分明。CNN Underscored 六月的實測又把 Zojirushi 放在頂端，因為它每次都能搞定壽司米、糙米和印度香米。對一週煮好幾晚飯的人來說，這升級你每一碗都吃得出來。

highlights.title: Tiger JKT-D10U 是最在意速度和糙米的人該買的那台
highlights.body: Tiger 的招牌就是煮得快又不犧牲口感，最新實測也站得住：白米 44 分鐘對 Zojirushi 的 53 分鐘，糙米 63 分鐘對 103 分鐘。更關鍵的是，Tiger 的糙米煮出來鬆散分明，不會軟爛黏成一坨，而很多鍋就是在糙米這關翻車。它是 IH 加熱機種，還附 tacook 同步炊煮盤，可以在飯上面同時蒸一道菜。如果你常吃糙米又最討厭等，這台就是你的。

highlights.title: Zojirushi NS-ZCC10 是撐了十年的聰明錢首選
highlights.body: 這台模糊邏輯 Zojirushi 是評測圈將近十年的預設推薦，2026 年依然是性價比標竿。它沒有 IH 也沒有壓力，所以價格比旗艦低不少，但靠同一套自適應炊煮邏輯，白米、糙米、壽司米都煮得穩定好吃。要買人生第一台認真的電子鍋，我都會叫人先看這台再考慮花更多錢。它證明了不用買到頂規，每晚也能吃到真正的好飯。

highlights.title: Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F 帶來真正的壓力炊煮，飯黏Q又有光澤
highlights.body: Cuckoo 能稱霸韓國市場是有道理的：它的壓力鍋把沸點推高，逼水分深入每一粒米心，這正是短粒米和黏米那種光澤帶嚼勁口感的來源。CRP-ST0609F 還用了好拆好洗的不鏽鋼內蓋，這個細節很多對手都省掉。如果你家偏好韓式和日式短粒米，這台能把口感做到道地正確，穩穩守住榜單第四。

highlights.body: This year's review cycle reaffirmed the same names, so I left every rank exactly where it earned its spot.

zh-tw.commentary:
Zojirushi NP-HCC10 續戴王冠，因為最重要的那件事它做得比誰都好：煮日本短粒米，每一次都粒粒分明、口感穩定。今年美國評測又把象印封為精準派代表，這跟我自己的經驗完全吻合。目標是完美白飯的話，這台 IH 電子鍋就是安全答案。

Tiger JKT-D10U 緊咬第二，我想講清楚它憑什麼。直接對決測試裡，它煮白飯跟象印一樣好吃，糙米更是粒粒輕盈蓬鬆，而且煮得明顯更快，白飯大約 44 分鐘對上象印的 53 分鐘。你家很在意速度跟糙米的話，我就會推這台。

Zojirushi NS-ZCC10 守住第三，是超值之選。它用更親民的價格給你象印模糊邏輯的體驗，所以價值分數一直很高。

Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F 續坐第四的多功能冠軍。它塞進了壓力烹煮跟一堆額外模式，而且速度大幅領先，白飯 20 到 28 分鐘就好。忙碌的平日晚上，這真的很實用。

2026 這一輪評測再次印證了這個順序，而不是推翻它，所以每個名次我都守住。這些都是成熟又經得起考驗的機器。當測試一直落在同樣這幾個名字上，誠實的作法就是別亂動這塊排行榜。

highlights.title: Zojirushi NP-HCC10 續坐第一
highlights.body: 短粒米每次都粒粒分明又穩定。2026 美國評測再度把它封為精準派代表。

highlights.title: Tiger JKT-D10U 主打快與糙米
highlights.body: 白飯一樣好吃，糙米更蓬鬆，煮飯約 44 分鐘對上 53 分鐘。趕時間就選它。

highlights.title: NS-ZCC10 是超值牌
highlights.body: 用更親民的價格給你象印模糊邏輯體驗，價值分數一直維持在榜上前段。

highlights.title: Cuckoo CRP-ST0609F 多功能冠軍
highlights.body: 壓力烹煮、多種模式，白飯 20 到 28 分鐘搞定，忙碌夜晚真的好用。

highlights.title: 2026 順序維持不變
highlights.body: 今年這輪評測再次印證同一批名字，所以每個名次我都留在它該在的位置。
